lede: A look at October 26 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including François Mitterrand and Emil Sayfutdinov, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Rockstar Games
events.desc: Rockstar Games releases Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas for the PlayStation 2 in North America, which sold 12 million units for the PS2, becoming the console's best-selling video game.

events.title: Robert Guéï
events.desc: A wave of protests forces Robert Guéï to step down as president after the Ivorian presidential election.

events.title: Ali Maow Maalin
events.desc: Ali Maow Maalin, the last natural case of smallpox, develops a rash in Somalia. The WHO and the CDC consider this date to be the anniversary of the eradication of smallpox, the most spectacular success of vaccination.

events.title: Ngo Dinh Diem
events.desc: Ngô Đình Diệm proclaims himself as President of the newly created Republic of Vietnam.

events.title: Ida B. Wells
events.desc: Ida B. Wells publishes Southern Horrors: Lynch Law in All Its Phases.

events.title: Edward James Roye
events.desc: Liberian President Edward James Roye is deposed in a coup d'état.

events.title: War of 1812
events.desc: War of 1812: A combined force of British regulars, Canadian militia and Mohawks defeat the United States Army in the Battle of the Chateauguay.

events.title: Imjin War
events.desc: Imjin War: Korean Admiral Yi Sun-sin routs the Japanese Navy of 300 ships with only 13 ships at the Battle of Myeongnyang.

events.title: Charles V, Holy Roman Emperor
events.desc: Charles V is crowned as Holy Roman Emperor.

births.name: François Mitterrand
births.line: French lawyer and politician, 21st President of France

births.name: Hillary Clinton
births.line: American lawyer and politician, 67th United States Secretary of State and 44th First Lady of the United States

deaths.text: Hoyt Axton, American singer-songwriter, guitarist, and actor
Park Chung Hee, South Korean general and politician, 3rd President of South Korea
Nikolaus Joseph von Jacquin, Dutch-Austrian chemist and botanist

observances.text: Christian feast day: Alfred the Great (Catholic Church, Anglican Church, Eastern Orthodox Church)
